title: おかわりどうぞ、いいこたち！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's race day. As I'm standing on the sidelines...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Super Creek waiting for the race to start
with a serious look in her eyes, while Oguri Cap's
expression is oddly blank.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: OGURI!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hyah?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Are you all right? You usually look more
relaxed...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...For some reason, when I heard people from my
hometown were going to be in the audience... my
body just stiffened up.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's nerves? Would eating some candy
help?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thanks, I'll take some.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap takes the candy from Super Creek and
seems to calm down.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hey, how is it that even at a time like this, you're
still able to look out for others?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're racing too. Shouldn't you be focused on
yourself?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you asked me a similar question before,
didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Since then, I've been thinking to myself. Why do I want to take care of others?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
For a long time, I didn't have an answer. But I
think I finally get it now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I want to race at full strength.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Think about it. Do you think you can run your
best when you're nervous, Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Probably... not.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Right? And when you can't run to the best of your
ability, you feel disappointed.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I think that's probably why I look after everyone.
So everyone can run their hearts out.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I see... You really are caring.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I don't see it that way. I just want to race
everyone when they're at their best! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Heh, okay. Then I'll make sure I don't hold back!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't want it any other way! ♪ Let the best
runner win today!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm going to pass out the rest of the candy
to the other racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, Super Creek hands out candy to
all her rivals.
